title: polygala gabrielae
intro: Polygala gabrielae, also known as Gabriel's root or Gabriel's tea, is a perennial plant species native to North America, belonging to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Polygala gabrielae include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as potentially treating conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Polygala gabrielae include tea infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
